2026/05/18 21:03:04.583393881 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583399886 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583400274 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583406110 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583406510 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583414701 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583415110 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583420523 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583420946 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583426791 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583427287 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583433843 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583434336 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583451945 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583452679 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583472281 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583472806 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583479100 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583479483 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583486093 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583492594 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583493015 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583539487 "default"))

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583548686 family <- family$metrics

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583555164 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583581500 }

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583238429 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583243817 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583303726 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583316461 {
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583317344 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583323252 new <- list()
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583323870 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583334169 new$width <- width
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583334896 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583345305 new$height <- height
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583345766 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583351938 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583352337 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583364050 new$title <- title
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583364769 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583374935 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583375663 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583393403 new$version <- version
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583393881 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583399886 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583400274 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583406110 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583406510 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583414701 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583415110 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583420523 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583420946 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583426791 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583427287 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583433843 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583434336 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583451945 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583452679 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583472281 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583472806 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583479100 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583479483 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583485703 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583486093 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583492594 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583493015 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583513981 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583514584 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583525163 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583525822 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583538618 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583539487 "default"))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583548275 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583548686 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583554753 }
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583555164 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583561623 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583562021 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583568215 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583568614 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583575264 }
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583575714 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583581500 }
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583581986 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583587622 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583588018 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583594268 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583594733 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583601846 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583602218 }
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583611914 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583612643 old$family <- family
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583624455 }
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583624903 version <- old$version
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583630241 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583630739 "2.0")

2026/05/18 21:03:04.583637077 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583644367 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583644789 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583651359 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583651773 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583659077 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583659489 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583666642 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583667068 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583675587 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583675999 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/18 21:03:04.583684551 invisible()
